title: RBI to conduct 7-day Variable Rate Reverse Repo (VRRR) auction under LAF on April 10, 2026
description: In view of the surplus transient liquidity conditions prevailing now, it has been decided to conduct a Variable Rate Reverse Repo (VRRR) auction on Friday, April 10, 2026, as under: Sl. No. Notified Amount (₹ crore) Tenor (day) Window Timing Date of Reversal 1 2,00,000 7 02:00 PM to 02:30 PM April 17, 2026 (Friday) 2. The operational guidelines for the auction as given in the Reserve Bank’s Press Release 2019-2020/1947 dated February 13, 2020 will remain the same. Ajit Prasad &n
